calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-29-2024 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:12 am and concluding at 9:21 am.

Plaintiff Penn Elcom Inc is present represented by David Brand, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Airhush Isat Systems, Inc. is not present.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

PHIL STRATFORD is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff Penn Elcom Inc submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Order Request
Exhibit 2: Pre payment wire transfer
Exhibit 3: Receipt
Exhibit 4: Accounting receipt

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Penn Elcom Inc, and against Defendant Airhush Isat Systems, Inc., as follows:

1. Damages: $31,250.76
2. Prejudgment Interest: $9801.20
3. Costs: $544.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $41,595.96
Proposed judgment signed and filed.(d505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2023 Continued To Mar-27-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
